timedAction
===========

Defines a callable action sound and/or animation.


Hierarchy
---------

**Valid Parent Blocks:**

- :doc:`module`


Parameters
----------

**actionAnim**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description

**animVarKey**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description

**animVarVal**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description

**completionSound**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description

**metabolics**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description

**muscleStrainFactor**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description

**muscleStrainParts**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description

**muscleStrainSkill**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description

**prop1**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description

**prop2**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description

**sound**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description

**soundTime**
   Type: ``Any``

   No description
